requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Emissions and Immunity (ES adopting CISPR 15 / IEC 61547) vs CN GB/T 17743 / GB/T 18595
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——发射与抗扰度（ES 采纳 CISPR 15/IEC 61547）vs 中国 GB/T 17743/GB/T 18595
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁兼容——發射與抗擾度（ES 採納 CISPR 15/IEC 61547）vs 中國 GB/T 17743/GB/T 18595

summary.en: Lighting equipment placed on the Egyptian market is expected to meet electromagnetic compatibility requirements through the relevant EOS ES standards, which adopt the international lighting EMC standards CISPR 15 (limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment) for emissions and IEC 61547 (equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements) for immunity. Test reports demonstrating conformance to the adopted ES/IEC EMC standards are part of the technical evidence the importer presents in connection with GOEIC import inspection and EOS conformity. Confirm the exact ES standard numbers and the edition of CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 adopted as currently in force.
summary.zh: 投放埃及市场的照明设备应通过相关 EOS ES 标准满足电磁兼容要求，这些标准在发射方面采纳国际照明 EMC 标准 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），在抗扰度方面采纳 IEC 61547（一般照明用设备 EMC 抗扰度要求）。证明符合所采纳 ES/IEC EMC 标准的检测报告是进口商在 GOEIC 进口检验及 EOS 合格评定中提交的技术证据的一部分。请确认确切的 ES 标准编号及现行有效采纳的 CISPR 15/IEC 61547 版本。
summary.zht: 投放埃及市場的照明設備應通過相關 EOS ES 標準滿足電磁兼容要求，這些標準在發射方面採納國際照明 EMC 標準 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），在抗擾度方面採納 IEC 61547（一般照明用設備 EMC 抗擾度要求）。證明符合所採納 ES/IEC EMC 標準的檢測報告是進口商在 GOEIC 進口檢驗及 EOS 合格評定中提交的技術證據的一部分。請確認確切的 ES 標準編號及現行有效採納的 CISPR 15/IEC 61547 版本。

standards_or_laws: EOS ES standard adopting CISPR 15 — radio disturbance (emissions) limits for electrical lighting and similar equipment (verify current ES number/edition)
EOS ES standard adopting IEC 61547 — EMC immunity requirements for general-lighting equipment (verify current ES number/edition)

summary.en: China's lighting EMC requirements are set by GB/T 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment — the CISPR 15 equivalent) for emissions, and GB/T 18595 (General lighting equipment — EMC immunity requirements — the IEC 61547 equivalent) for immunity. These are technically aligned with the international CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 base, and EMC conformance is part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China under CNCA rules.
summary.zh: 中国照明 EMC 要求由 GB/T 17743（电气照明和类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法——CISPR 15 对应标准）规定发射，由 GB/T 18595（一般照明设备 EMC 抗扰度要求——IEC 61547 对应标准）规定抗扰度。这些标准在技术上与国际 CISPR 15/IEC 61547 基础对齐，EMC 合规是 CNCA 规则下中国销售灯具 CCC 认证的一部分。
summary.zht: 中國照明 EMC 要求由 GB/T 17743（電氣照明和類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法——CISPR 15 對應標準）規定發射，由 GB/T 18595（一般照明設備 EMC 抗擾度要求——IEC 61547 對應標準）規定抗擾度。這些標準在技術上與國際 CISPR 15/IEC 61547 基礎對齊，EMC 合規是 CNCA 規則下中國銷售燈具 CCC 認證的一部分。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (China, CISPR 15-aligned)
GB/T 18595 — General lighting equipment EMC immunity requirements (China, IEC 61547-aligned)

gap.en: Because both China's GB/T 17743 / GB/T 18595 and Egypt's ES standards trace to the same CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 base, the underlying technical limits are closely aligned and a well-designed CN-compliant luminaire will typically meet the Egyptian EMC limits on substance. The gap is administrative rather than technical: the test report must reference the ES/IEC standard editions accepted by EOS/GOEIC (not the GB/T numbers), and may need to be issued by or recognised through a laboratory acceptable to Egyptian conformity assessment. Confirm with the importer whether existing CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 reports are accepted directly, and check that the test report edition matches the currently adopted Egyptian ES edition. CCC EMC test data is not automatically transferable.
gap.zh: 由于中国 GB/T 17743/GB/T 18595 与埃及 ES 标准均源自相同的 CISPR 15/IEC 61547 基础，底层技术限值高度对齐，设计良好的符合中国标准的灯具在实质上通常能满足埃及 EMC 限值。差距是行政性而非技术性的：检测报告须引用 EOS/GOEIC 接受的 ES/IEC 标准版本（而非 GB/T 编号），并可能须由埃及合格评定可接受的实验室出具或经其认可。请与进口商确认现有 CISPR 15/IEC 61547 报告是否被直接接受，并核对检测报告版本是否与现行采纳的埃及 ES 版本一致。CCC 的 EMC 检测数据不可自动转移。
gap.zht: 由於中國 GB/T 17743/GB/T 18595 與埃及 ES 標準均源自相同的 CISPR 15/IEC 61547 基礎，底層技術限值高度對齊，設計良好的符合中國標準的燈具在實質上通常能滿足埃及 EMC 限值。差距是行政性而非技術性的：檢測報告須引用 EOS/GOEIC 接受的 ES/IEC 標準版本（而非 GB/T 編號），並可能須由埃及合格評定可接受的實驗室出具或經其認可。請與進口商確認現有 CISPR 15/IEC 61547 報告是否被直接接受，並核對檢測報告版本是否與現行採納的埃及 ES 版本一致。CCC 的 EMC 檢測數據不可自動轉移。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (technical requirement) — EMC conformance to ES standards adopting CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 expected; test report referencing the adopted ES/IEC editions required for GOEIC/EOS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 17743 / GB/T 18595 EMC conformance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egypt's lighting EMC requirements derive from CISPR 15 (emissions) and IEC 61547 (immunity), the same base as China's GB/T 17743 / GB/T 18595, so technical limits are closely aligned. The gap is administrative: the report must reference the EOS-adopted ES/IEC editions and come from a laboratory acceptable to Egyptian conformity assessment. Confirm with the importer whether existing CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 reports are accepted directly.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及的照明 EMC 要求源自 CISPR 15（发射）和 IEC 61547（抗扰度），与中国 GB/T 17743/GB/T 18595 基础相同，因此技术限值高度对齐。差距是行政性的：报告须引用 EOS 采纳的 ES/IEC 版本，并来自埃及合格评定可接受的实验室。请与进口商确认现有 CISPR 15/IEC 61547 报告是否被直接接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及的照明 EMC 要求源自 CISPR 15（發射）和 IEC 61547（抗擾度），與中國 GB/T 17743/GB/T 18595 基礎相同，因此技術限值高度對齊。差距是行政性的：報告須引用 EOS 採納的 ES/IEC 版本，並來自埃及合格評定可接受的實驗室。請與進口商確認現有 CISPR 15/IEC 61547 報告是否被直接接受。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Approval for Wireless/Smart Luminaires — NTRA Type Approval vs CN SRRC
requirement_topic.zh: 无线/智能灯具的无线电核准——NTRA 型号核准 vs 中国 SRRC
requirement_topic.zht: 無線/智能燈具的無線電核准——NTRA 型號核准 vs 中國 SRRC

summary.en: Smart or connected LED luminaires that incorporate a radio transmitter (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or other RF) require type approval from Egypt's NTRA (National Telecom Regulatory Authority) before they can be imported and placed on the Egyptian market. NTRA approval governs the use of radio spectrum and equipment, and is separate from EOS product-safety/EMC conformity and from GOEIC importer registration. The approval is based on the radio module's conformance to NTRA technical requirements (which generally follow internationally recognised RF standards). For a non-wireless LED luminaire NTRA approval is not required, but any wireless variant in the product line must be cleared with NTRA independently.
summary.zh: 包含无线电发射器（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或其他射频）的智能或联网 LED 灯具，在进口并投放埃及市场前须取得埃及国家电信监管局（NTRA）的型号核准。NTRA 核准管理无线电频谱和设备的使用，与 EOS 产品安全/EMC 合格评定及 GOEIC 进口商注册相互独立。核准依据无线电模块符合 NTRA 技术要求（一般遵循国际公认的射频标准）。对于非无线 LED 灯具无需 NTRA 核准，但产品线中的任何无线型号须单独向 NTRA 报批。
summary.zht: 包含無線電發射器（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或其他射頻）的智能或聯網 LED 燈具，在進口並投放埃及市場前須取得埃及國家電信監管局（NTRA）的型號核准。NTRA 核准管理無線電頻譜和設備的使用，與 EOS 產品安全/EMC 合格評定及 GOEIC 進口商注冊相互獨立。核准依據無線電模塊符合 NTRA 技術要求（一般遵循國際公認的射頻標準）。對於非無線 LED 燈具無需 NTRA 核准，但產品線中的任何無線型號須單獨向 NTRA 報批。

standards_or_laws: NTRA (National Telecom Regulatory Authority, Egypt) — type approval / equipment approval for radio-transmitting devices
Egyptian Telecommunication Regulation Law No. 10 of 2003 — basis for NTRA equipment and spectrum approval

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission, under MIIT) type approval (型号核准) for the radio module before they may be sold or used. The SRRC approval covers the device's RF emissions, frequency use, and transmit power against Chinese radio regulations. For domestic sale, SRRC is in addition to CCC product safety/EMC certification. SRRC approval is China-specific and is not recognised by NTRA.
summary.zh: 在中国，具备无线功能的灯具在销售或使用前须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC，隶属工信部）对无线电模块的型号核准。SRRC 核准依据中国无线电法规涵盖设备的射频发射、频率使用及发射功率。对于国内销售，SRRC 是在 CCC 产品安全/EMC 认证之外的额外要求。SRRC 核准为中国特有，不被 NTRA 认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，具備無線功能的燈具在銷售或使用前須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC，隸屬工信部）對無線電模塊的型號核准。SRRC 核准依據中國無線電法規涵蓋設備的射頻發射、頻率使用及發射功率。對於國內銷售，SRRC 是在 CCC 產品安全/EMC 認證之外的額外要求。SRRC 核准為中國特有，不被 NTRA 認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (型号核准) — State Radio Regulation Commission / MIIT, for radio-transmitting devices in China
Regulations of the People's Republic of China on Radio Administration — basis for SRRC approval

gap.en: A Chinese smart luminaire that holds an SRRC type approval still requires a separate NTRA type approval for Egypt — SRRC and NTRA do not recognise each other. The radio module's underlying RF design may meet international standards used by both regimes, but the administrative approval is country-specific: the importer must lodge the NTRA application (typically with RF test reports, device documentation, and importer details) before customs clearance of the wireless variant. This is an additional step beyond the EOS product-safety/EMC route and the GOEIC importer registration. Plan NTRA approval lead time for any connected SKU, and keep wireless and non-wireless variants distinct so that a non-wireless luminaire is not held up by the radio approval process.
gap.zh: 持有 SRRC 型号核准的中国智能灯具进入埃及仍须单独取得 NTRA 型号核准——SRRC 与 NTRA 互不认可。无线电模块的底层射频设计可能满足两个体制使用的国际标准，但行政核准是按国别进行的：进口商须在无线型号清关前提交 NTRA 申请（通常含射频检测报告、设备文件及进口商信息）。这是在 EOS 产品安全/EMC 路径及 GOEIC 进口商注册之外的额外步骤。请为任何联网型号预留 NTRA 核准的处理周期，并将无线与非无线型号区分清楚，以免非无线灯具被无线电核准流程拖延。
gap.zht: 持有 SRRC 型號核准的中國智能燈具進入埃及仍須單獨取得 NTRA 型號核准——SRRC 與 NTRA 互不認可。無線電模塊的底層射頻設計可能滿足兩個體制使用的國際標準，但行政核准是按國別進行的：進口商須在無線型號清關前提交 NTRA 申請（通常含射頻檢測報告、設備文件及進口商信息）。這是在 EOS 產品安全/EMC 路徑及 GOEIC 進口商注冊之外的額外步驟。請為任何聯網型號預留 NTRA 核准的處理周期，並將無線與非無線型號區分清楚，以免非無線燈具被無線電核准流程拖延。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (wireless only) — NTRA type approval required for radio-transmitting (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth/Zigbee) smart luminaires before import; not required for non-wireless luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (wireless only) — SRRC type approval required for radio-transmitting luminaires in China; not required for non-wireless luminaires

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless/smart LED luminaires require NTRA type approval for Egypt, a separate country-specific radio approval that SRRC certification does not satisfy. Non-wireless luminaires are out of NTRA scope. For any connected SKU, plan NTRA application lead time alongside the EOS/GOEIC route, and keep wireless variants administratively distinct from non-wireless ones.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无线/智能 LED 灯具进入埃及须取得 NTRA 型号核准，这是 SRRC 认证无法满足的、按国别进行的独立无线电核准。非无线灯具不在 NTRA 范围内。对于任何联网型号，请在 EOS/GOEIC 路径之外预留 NTRA 申请周期，并将无线型号与非无线型号在行政上区分。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無線/智能 LED 燈具進入埃及須取得 NTRA 型號核准，這是 SRRC 認證無法滿足的、按國別進行的獨立無線電核准。非無線燈具不在 NTRA 範圍內。對於任何聯網型號，請在 EOS/GOEIC 路徑之外預留 NTRA 申請周期，並將無線型號與非無線型號在行政上區分。
